sections.paragraph:
(for תֹּהֶו a segolate and penacute form, subst.-

(1) wasteness, concr. that which is wasted, laid waste, Gen 1:2 Job 26:7 hence-(a) a desert, Deu 32:10 Job 6:18 12:24 .-(b) destruction, Isa 24:10, קִרְיַת תֹּהוּ “a desolated city;” 34:11 .

(2) emptiness, vanity, and concr. something vain (syn. הֶבֶל), Isa 41:29 44:9 49:4 59:4 1Sa 12:21 nothing, i.q. אַיִן Isa 40:17, 23 Isa 40:23.

(3) לְתֹהוּ Isa 49:4 and acc. תֹּהוּ adv. in vain, Isa 45:19.
